digest.component_or_area: LLM review gates observability sidecars (plan-review / code-review / completion-verification)
propositions: Plan-review and code-review sidecars drop data (pass-1 evidence/scenarios, non-surfaced buckets, resolved numeric block_threshold), so the durable audit record is incomplete.
Completion-verification persists a sidecar only on FAIL, leaving a PASS with no per-criterion audit record beyond signed counts.
Enrich existing sidecars in place with new v2 schemas to losslessly capture the full four-pass record across all buckets including resolved threshold and coaching.
A completion-verification PASS should emit a per-criterion audit record, not just counts.
Review-sidecar retention (currently 10 per ticket) must be raised so review history is deep enough to audit.
A documented read layer (library + CLI + MCP) should return full retained audit history for a ticket and resolve associated code reviews via relates_to links.
